ddls:
CREATE TABLE "institutes" (
  "instcd" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institute */,
  "institute_name" TEXT /* Name of the institute */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the institute */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the institute */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the institute */,
  "email" TEXT /* Official email address of the institute */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the institute was established */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the institute is currently active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instcd")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "progcd" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "instcd" INTEGER /* Reference to the institute offering the program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "duration_years" INTEGER /* Duration of the program in years */,
  "degree_type" TEXT /* Type of degree (e.g., B.Tech, M.Tech) */,
  "is_part_time" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the program is part-time or full-time */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the program */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progcd"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_instcd FOREIGN KEY ("instcd") REFERENCES institutes ("instcd")
)

CREATE TABLE "quotas" (
  "quotacd" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quota */,
  "progcd" INTEGER /* Reference to the program the quota belongs to */,
  "quota_name" TEXT /* Name of the quota */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the quota (e.g., ST, OBC-NCL, OPEN) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender eligibility for the quota (e.g., Gender-Neutral, Female-only) */,
  "quota_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the quota */,
  "number_of_seats" INTEGER /* Number of seats available under the quota */,
  "is_open" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the quota is currently open for applications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quotacd"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quotas_progcd FOREIGN KEY ("progcd") REFERENCES programs ("progcd")
)

CREATE TABLE "admission_criteria" (
  "admcrid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admission criterion */,
  "quotacd" INTEGER /* Reference to the quota the admission criterion belongs to */,
  "opening_rank" INTEGER /* Opening rank for the quota */,
  "closing_rank" INTEGER /* Closing rank for the quota */,
  "admission_year" INTEGER /* Year for which the admission criteria are applicable */,
  "admission_round" TEXT /* Round of admission (e.g., Round 1, Round 2) */,
  "admission_fee" TEXT /* Admission fee for the quota */,
  "is_finalized" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the admission criteria are finalized */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admcrid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admission_criteria_quotacd FOREIGN KEY ("quotacd") REFERENCES quotas ("quotacd")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "studid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the student is applying for */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "category" TEXT /* Social category of the student (e.g., ST, OBC-NCL) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "application_status" TEXT /* Status of the student's application (e.g., Pending, Accepted, Rejected) */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the student applied for the program */,
  "admission_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the student for admission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("studid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("progcd")
)
